name: @type1skills/ideas-radar
description: Static innovation cockpit for accepted, incubating, inbox, and rejected ideas.

commands.name: type1skills ideas-radar snapshot
commands.description: Build .type1skills/ideas-radar/snapshot.json from IDEAS.md, TODO.md, idea docs, and task capsules.

commands.name: type1skills ideas-radar open
commands.description: Open the static Ideas Radar dashboard for the latest snapshot.
